level_signals: 8+ years in a product or technical role
High degree of autonomy and responsibility
Define and drive an ambitious roadmap
Establish team pace, clear prioritization, and rigorous execution standards

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years in a product or technical role, with experience shipping world-class consumer products at scale
must_haves.qualifier: with experience shipping world-class consumer products at scale

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: High taste, design empathy, and sharp judgment — can put yourself in the shoes of consumers and be a steward of crafting great experiences
Rigorous with data — comfortable digging into metrics, writing SQL when needed, and thinking from first principles to deliver the right results
Desire for continuous product improvement; able to optimize for shipping a portfolio of small, medium, and large releases
Ownership mindset — works on whatever it takes to solve problems and delight consumers
Strong written and verbal communication, with a talent for distilling user problems into precise, actionable framing
Experience managing high-stakes external partnerships — aligning on milestones and executing integrations end-to-end
Thrives with a high level of autonomy and responsibility

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working on consumer financial products
Experience building brand new products or working in a startup environment
Experience working with GTM teams to bring a new product to market

scope.surface: Link App (web and native) — consumer digital wallet, identity, and payments experience
scope.business_model: consumer network / B2C2B (consumer-facing wallet enabling merchant payments)
primary_metrics_inferred: Consumer conversion and retention on Link
Consumer registrations and active users (300M+ registered base)
Feature adoption across wallet, identity, and finance products
core_responsibilities: Own the consumer perspective — spend time with users, partner closely with Engineering, GTM, and Operations, and synthesize feedback and market signals into clear product direction
Be the voice of the Link consumer, both within the team and across Stripe
Define and drive an ambitious roadmap, from expanding core capabilities to leading nascent initiatives through to maturity
Establish team pace, clear prioritization, and rigorous execution standards
Partner deeply with Engineering, Design, Data Science, Marketing, Sales, and Operations to ship cohesive, frictionless experiences

green_flags: Clear product surface with large scale (300M+ registered consumers)
Ambitious and forward-looking team mandate (AI agents, stablecoins, identity)
Minimum requirements clearly delineated from preferred qualifications
Encourages candidates who meet minimum requirements to apply even without preferred qualifications
Cross-functional partner list is specific and realistic
red_flags: No location, compensation, or visa/sponsorship information stated in the JD
8+ years is a high bar that narrows the candidate pool significantly
JD does not clarify remote vs. hybrid vs. on-site working arrangement

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 8+ years requirement and scope of ownership/autonomy language)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities and product context; not explicit in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and Stripe's platform context)
ambiguities: No location type (remote/hybrid/onsite) is specified anywhere in the JD; set to 'unclear'
Work authorization and visa sponsorship are not addressed; set to 'unclear'

The JD says 'technical PM' in the body but the minimum requirements do not explicitly require an engineering background; archetype confidence set to 'high' based on SQL requirement and framing, but the role also has strong consumer/generalist PM elements
